title: Definitions
doc_html:
§1082. Definitions

            The definitions provided in the Children's Code shall be applicable to this Part, unless the context clearly indicates otherwise.

            Acts 1978, No. 786, §2, eff. Jan. 1, 1979; Acts 2021, No. 158, §3.
doc_text:
§1082.  Definitions
The definitions provided in the Children's Code shall be applicable to this Part, unless
the context clearly indicates otherwise.
Acts 1978, No. 786, §2, eff. Jan. 1, 1979; Acts 2021, No. 158, §3.
